summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Soil and Scent candle business landing page. All core functionality working perfectly including navigation, WhatsApp integration, Instagram links, product gallery, testimonials, and mobile responsiveness.
passed_tests: Hero section displays properly with candle images
Navigation links work correctly (Shop, Our Story, Testimonials, Contact)
WhatsApp floating button appears and links to correct number (+91 8789028909) with pre-filled message
Instagram link in header points to @soilandscent
Product gallery section shows all 3 product candle images
Our Story section displays properly with image and content
Testimonials section shows all 3 customer reviews
Footer shows correct WhatsApp number and Instagram handle
All buttons have proper hover effects
Mobile menu hamburger button works correctly
Responsive design works properly on mobile and desktop
External links open in new tabs with proper security attributes
WhatsApp links contain correct pre-filled message: 'Hi! I'm interested in your candles'
